title: Brazil as the Empirical Center of SignWriting
subtitle: Documented institutional density, research opportunity, and why Brazil matters
summary: Primary country anchor for the Sutton SignWriting Evidence and Adoption series.
synopsis: This entry establishes Brazil as the first major empirical anchor of the Sutton SignWriting Evidence and Adoption series. It sharpens the strongest existing Brazil material into a disciplined brief that treats Brazil as the clearest documented empirical center for SignWriting rather than as a side example or supporting anecdote.
